prompt:
Goal: Create an ultra-detailed fantasy anime illustration of a teal-haired dragon knight princess standing inside a ruined cathedral-like atelier filled with paper models, crystal circuitry, and magical engineering relics.

Canvas: Vertical portrait composition, 4:5 aspect ratio, dense foreground-to-background detail, cinematic lighting, no border, no watermark.

Main subject: One young anime woman stands slightly right of center, facing forward with a calm serious expression. She has very long flowing turquoise teal hair, small horn-like accessories, pale skin, and an ornate black, white, and silver gothic fantasy outfit with layered skirt panels, armor straps, ribbons, chains, and gem details. She holds one long spear or lance diagonally across her body, its shaft extending from lower center toward upper left, with delicate metallic ornaments and teal magical glow.

Creature and companion count: Include exactly 3 major companion figures: 1 enormous pale stone-and-teal dragon coiling behind and to the right of the girl, with an angular head, glowing green eyes, folded serpentine neck, and crystalline teal accents; 1 adorable teal dragon plush toy seated in the lower-left foreground, with soft rounded limbs, small horns, a large glowing turquoise gem-like eye, tiny claws, and ornate jewelry around its neck; 1 translucent turquoise holographic spirit girl on the left side behind the plush, glowing like a projected magical blueprint, with long hair and a faint dress silhouette.

Foreground objects count: Include exactly 5 prominent foreground relics: 1 large beige paper-model spaceship or airship stretching across the bottom from left to right with panel lines, teal glowing circular engine light, and emerald stained-glass sections; 1 small ornate birdcage-like golden structure at the lower left; 1 rectangular paper blueprint tag hanging near the lower right; 1 cluster of teal crystals near the plush; 1 tangled web of golden chains and filigree wires draped over the spaceship and floor.

Environment: The setting is an immense gothic cathedral workshop with tall pointed arches, carved ivory stone, miniature spires, scaffold-like paper architecture, suspended wires, blueprint sheets, fragmented parchment panels, and teal crystal growths. In the upper center background, place 1 large circular rose window glowing turquoise and white, with exactly 3 tall lancet stained-glass windows beneath it. Add additional narrow stained-glass windows at the sides, but keep the central rose window dominant.

Visual style: Highly polished Japanese fantasy illustration, ornate anime character design, intricate linework, soft painterly rendering, luminous turquoise and emerald highlights, warm beige stone and parchment tones, ethereal dust, layered depth, magical cathedral ambience, elegant steampunk-paper-craft details, extremely detailed but harmonious.

Lighting and color: Use a palette of ivory, antique parchment, silver, deep charcoal, emerald, and glowing cyan-teal. Backlight the scene through stained glass, add turquoise rim light around the dragon, hologram, crystals, plush eye, and spear ornaments. Keep the mood dreamy, mysterious, and luxurious.

Constraints: No readable text, no modern objects, no extra characters beyond the 1 main girl, 1 large dragon, 1 plush dragon, and 1 holographic spirit girl. The plush dragon should look especially cute and desirable as a stuffed toy while still matching the elaborate fantasy world.
